Captured: 2026-03-08

Canonical documents used:
- docs/spec/CLIENT_RELAY_PROTOCOL_V1.md
- docs/spec/RECEIPTS.md
- docs/protocol.md

Requested document status:
- docs/migration/CLIENT_RELAY_CONFORMANCE_FIXTURES.md is not present at this ref.

Fixture provenance:
- frames/* extracted from JSON examples in CLIENT_RELAY_PROTOCOL_V1.md.
- payloads/envelope_v1_canonical_example_01.b64url.txt generated from docs/protocol.md Canonical Bytes v1 EnvelopeV1 layout using deterministic field values:
  - toWayfarerId bytes: 0x00..0x1f
  - manifestId bytes: "manifest-fixed-0001"
  - body bytes: "hello-aethos"
- encoded bytes hex:
  01010100000020000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f02000000136d616e69666573742d66697865642d30303031030000000c68656c6c6f2d616574686f73

Fixture expectation modes:
- canonical_v1: aligned canonical-v1 expectations.
- transitional_compat: explicit, known relay divergences from canonical-v1 that are intentionally retained during migration.
